resources.string: Add a few books first to get recommendations.
Search for a book or author
There are no books to read
Add a new book with Add Book below or search with Open Library.
You haven\'t read any books yet
You can mark a card as read by pressing and holding it in the Books to Read list.
You don\'t have a favorite book
You can add it to favorites by swiping right in the book list.
Failed to load profile data. You can fill in the fields yourself.
The photo could not be loaded. Check your connection and storage rules.
Database updated; Failed to update session profile: %1$s
3–20 characters; only letters, numbers and underscores (_)
Swipe left: delete · Swipe right: favorite
Switch between lists with the tabs at the top · Tap: detail · Hold: read/to-read · Swipe left: delete · Right: favorite
There are no books matching your selected search and filters. You can reset or collapse filters with Clear at the top.
You can change the read / to be read status by pressing and holding the card.
You can change the read / to be read status by pressing and holding the card.
You can change the read / to be read status by pressing and holding the card.
This book will be added to your read books list. You can later view it again and edit your grade and score information from the Read Books screen.
You haven\'t set a goal yet. You can add a goal to track your reading habit.

Congratulations. You have completed the reading goal you set. We hope that this regular effort will contribute to your reading culture. You can continue your journey by updating your goal in the new period.
Please enter a number between 1 and 999.
Rate of books read based on your total shelf
Ratio of favorite marked books to shelf
Average star rating for books rated
%1$d points are available in the book
When you rate at least one book between 1 and 5, it will appear here.
You have no books read yet or no genre information; This section will be filled as you read.
No books read yet. You can mark the card in your to-read list by pressing and holding it.
There are no books to read. Fill your shelf with Add Books from the Bottom.
The final recommendation appears here. You can request new suggestions with Get Suggestions.
No suggestions yet. With Get suggestions, you can ask for new suggestions from artificial intelligence.
There are no registered suggestions. Get a recommendation first.
The chat summary appears here. When you start talking to the assistant, the latest messages are listed.
There is no recorded conversation summary.
Chat assistant will be added soon.
You can ask questions about books, reading habits, genre and author recommendations, or DigitalRaf usage. Write it below and press Send.
An error has occurred. Try again.
There are no books on the user\'s shelf yet.

You are the Turkish chat assistant of the library application DigitalRaf. Keep your answers short, clear and polite.\\n\\nTopics: book recommendations and reviews; reading habits and goals; genre (science fiction, history, etc.) and author recommendations; application usage — e.g. Read/To Be Read lists, favorites, notes and scores, adding books.\\n\\nMaking predictions for application features you don\'t know; Direct the user to relevant in-app screens.\\n\\nGiving definitive medical/legal advice. Use bullets for long lists.
Your score is stored in the cloud with your account; Updated on all devices.
The book could not be loaded.
No summary or description has been added for this book.
Quick operations — on the bottom for one-handed access
Your grade and score are also stored on this device; it is restored when you open the book again. It is also updated in the cloud.
Your note is stored in the cloud with your account; Updated on all devices.
Do you want to delete the personal note?
Save the sentences you like from this book here; It is kept in the cloud with your account.
Tap the + button in the bottom right for the new quote.
No quotes yet. You can add it with + at the bottom right.
Do you want to delete this quote?
Press and hold or tap to see history
Remove this book from your library permanently? You can undo for a short time with Undo below.
Type the book title or author to search.
No results found for this search. Try another word or spelling.
There is no OpenRouter API key. Add the line OPENROUTER_API_KEY=... to the local.properties file in the project root (openrouter.ai/keys).
The password reset link has been sent to your e-mail address. Check your inbox and junk (spam) folder if necessary.
The password reset email could not be sent. %1$s
This email address does not appear to be valid. Please check and try again.
No account registered with this email was found. Check the address or register.
Don\'t have an account? Sign Up

As a developer, do the following:\\n\\n1) Firebase Console → Authentication → Sign-in method → ​​Enable Google.\\n2) Project settings → Add the debug/release SHA-1 fingerprint to your application.\\n3) Paste the Web client ID value from the same section into the default_web_client_id field in the google_signin_config.xml file in the project.\\n\\nThen recompile the application.
Google login configuration error. Check SHA-1, google-services.json and Web client ID (default_web_client_id) settings.
Google login failed (code: %1$d). Try again later.
Could not retrieve credentials from Google login. Try again.
The email or password is incorrect.
There have been many attempts. Try again after a while.
This email is registered with a different login method. Try logging in with email first.
Enter a valid email address (e.g. ad@site.com).
The domain name appears to be invalid. Use a real domain name and extension (e.g. gmail.com).
Verification email has been sent. Check your inbox and spam folder.
Verify your email address. Some features are unlocked after verification.
Your account has not been verified by email. Click the link in your inbox.
For this feature, verify your email first. You can resend from the Profile tab.
Name and surname cannot be empty
Password must be at least 6 characters
Could not log in. Try again.
Failed to write profile to cloud (check rules): %1$s
Account created but Realtime Database post rejected (check rules). %1$s — You can continue from the login screen.
Could not save profile: %1$s. Registration was rolled back; you can try again with the same email.
Could not save profile: %1$s. Error while closing the account: %2$s. Session cleared; sign in to complete your profile or contact support.
Verification email could not be sent: %1$s. Session cleared; sign in and resend from your profile.
📚 I have a book recommendation for you!\\n\\n
You are a Turkish-speaking book recommendation assistant. Only give short and clear answers in the desired structure. Writing an introductory paragraph or summary sentence; start list directly.
Recommend exactly 5 books suitable for general readers.\\n
Just use these three lines for each suggestion (add a title):\\nBook: …\\nAuthor: …\\nWhy: …\\nLeave a blank line between suggestions. Keep the overall length reasonable.
Chat messages are empty; The request could not be sent.
The service is busy right now. Try again in a few minutes.
Too many requests (429). The free model quota may be full; Try again after a while.
API key is invalid (401). Check the key on openrouter.ai/keys and recompile with BuildConfig.
The model returned an empty or invalid response. Try again.
The connection has timed out. Check your network and try again.
There is no internet connection or the server name could not be resolved. Check your connection.

\\n Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Nam in scelerisque sem. Mauris\\n volutpat, dolor id interdum ullamcorper, risus dolor egestas lectus, sit amet mattis purus\\n dui nec risus. Maecenas non sodales nisi, vel dictum dolor. Class aptent taciti sociosqu ad\\n litora torquent per conubia nostra, per inceptos himenaeos. Suspendisse blandit eleifend\\n diam, vel rutrum tellus vulputate quis. Aliquam eget libero aliquet, imperdiet nisl a,\\n ornare ex. Sed rhoncus est ut libero porta lobortis. Fusce in dictum tellus.\\n\\n\\n Suspendisse interdum ornare ante. Aliquam nec cursus lorem. Morbi id magna felis. Vivamus\\n egestas, est a condimentum egestas, turpis nisl iaculis ipsum, in dictum tellus dolor sed\\n neque. Morbi tellus erat, dapibus ut sem a, iaculis tincidunt dui. Interdum et malesuada\\n fames ac ante ipsum primis in faucibus. Curabitur et eros porttitor, ultricies urna vitae,\\n molestie nibh. Phasellus at commodo eros, non aliquet metus. Sed maximus nisl nec dolor\\n bibendum, vel congue leo egestas.\\n\\n\\n Sed interdum tortor nibh, in sagittis risus mollis quis. Curabitur mi odio, condimentum sit\\n amet auctor at, mollis non turpis. Nullam pretium libero vestibulum, finibus orci vel,\\n molestie quam. Fusce blandit tincidunt nulla, quis sollicitudin libero facilisis et. Integer\\n interdum nunc ligula, et fermentum metus hendrerit id. Vestibulum lectus felis, dictum at\\n lacinia sit amet, tristique id quam. Cras eu consequat dui. Suspendisse sodales nunc ligula,\\n in lobortis sem porta sed. Integer id ultrices magna, in luctus elit. Sed a pellentesque\\n est.\\n\\n\\n Aenean nunc velit, lacinia sed dolor sed, ultrices viverra nulla. Etiam a venenatis nibh.\\n Morbi laoreet, tortor sed facilisis varius, nibh orci rhoncus nulla, id elementum leo dui\\n non lorem. Nam mollis ipsum quis auctor varius. Quisque elementum eu libero sed commodo. In\\n eros nisl, imperdiet vel imperdiet et, scelerisque a mauris. Pellentesque varius ex nunc,\\n quis imperdiet eros placerat ac. Duis finibus orci et est auctor tincidunt. Sed non viverra\\n ipsum. Nunc quis augue egestas, cursus lorem at, molestie sem. Morbi a consectetur ipsum, a\\n placerat diam. Etiam vulputate dignissim convallis. Integer faucibus mauris sit amet finibus\\n convallis.\\n\\n\\n Phasellus in aliquet mi. Pellentesque habitant morbi tristique senectus et netus et\\n malesuada fames ac turpis egestas. In volutpat arcu ut felis sagittis, in finibus massa\\n gravida. Pellentesque id tellus orci. Integer dictum, lorem sed efficitur ullamcorper,\\n libero justo consectetur ipsum, in mollis nisl ex sed nisl. Donec maximus ullamcorper\\n sodales. Praesent bibendum rhoncus tellus nec feugiat. In a ornare nulla. Donec rhoncus\\n libero vel nunc consequat, quis tincidunt nisl eleifend. Cras bibendum enim a justo luctus\\n vestibulum. Fusce dictum libero quis erat maximus, vitae volutpat diam dignissim.\\n
